overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a large RDA survey vessel flying through the misty floating mountains of Pandora. The camera tracks the vessel as it passes by, then continues panning across the ethereal landscape of towering rock spires shrouded in blue atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial survey flight through misty floating mountains

events.description: large survey vessel completes flyby and exits frame to the right

agents.ego_description: flying alongside the survey vessel, maintaining pace as it traverses the misty mountain range

notable_agents.action: large twin-hulled survey vessel flying steadily from left to right through the mountain range

entered.detail: large rusted metal aerial vessel with twin hulls, marked with '02' and orange navigation lights on top
tall mist-shrouded rock formations with vegetation growing on ledges
tiny aerial vehicles visible as dark silhouettes in the distant haze

segments.scene_description: The camera flies alongside a massive RDA survey vessel as it navigates through Pandora's floating mountains. The rusted metal aircraft dominates the foreground while misty rock spires loom in the background, all bathed in cool blue atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast floating mountain range with scattered aerial traffic

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the vast landscape of floating mountains, drifting past towering rock spires

entered.detail: additional rock towers emerging from the mist as the camera advances

segments.scene_description: After the survey vessel exits the frame, the camera continues its slow aerial drift through the misty floating mountains. The massive rock spires gradually shift from right to left as the viewpoint advances, with distant aerial traffic occasionally visible through the persistent blue haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial movement that transitions from a close tracking shot of an industrial vessel to a wide, drifting vista of a mystical mountain range. It begins by flying alongside a massive, rusted RDA survey vessel, with the aircraft's metallic hull dominating the foreground against a backdrop of looming rock spires. As the vessel exits the frame, the camera continues its slow forward drift, allowing the perspective to open up and reveal the vast scale of the floating mountains. The scene then shifts as the towering spires gradually glide from right to left through a persistent blue atmospheric haze. Finally, the viewpoint advances deeper into the ethereal landscape, catching glimpses of distant aerial traffic scattered across the misty horizon.
